changelog:
CHANGELOG - TCT LABEL ERP

============================================================
Phien ban 1.3.0.0 - hoan thien tra cuu PO/SAP 16/07/2026
============================================================

- Them tim nguoc SAP -> PO, hien danh sach PO ung vien de nguoi dung doi chieu truoc khi chon.
- Khac phuc truong hop API lich su SAP chua dong bo: ERP ket hop lich su he thong voi chi muc PO/SAP cuc bo.
- Moi PO ung vien luon duoc doc lai tu API PO goc truoc khi hien thi, tranh dung ket qua cache cu.
- Cache chi luu ma PO, ma SAP va thoi diem tra cuu tai LocalAppData; khong luu tai khoan, mat khau, cookie hay token.
- Them bo loc Kho SAP; viec loc kho thuc hien tren ERP sau khi doc PO, khong gui lenh thay doi len he thong cong ty.
- Giu rieng tung dong PO va sap xep cac dong cung SAP lien nhau, theo ma SAP tu nho den lon.
- Tai goi y Part Number nen voi toi da 4 yeu cau dong thoi, giam hien tuong form bi khung va con tro xoay lau.
- Mo rong o ngay, sua nut AP DUNG/ADD bi mat chu va giai phong con tro ngay sau khi bang PO hien du lieu.
- Them tai lieu HUONG_DAN_KY_THUAT_TRA_CUU_PO_CHO_CNTT.txt de mo ta ket noi chi doc va cac tinh huong trao doi voi CNTT.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.3.0.0 - tra cuu PO chi doc 15/07/2026
============================================================

- Them nut TRA CUU PO tren man hinh Label de doc danh sach vat tu theo PO tu he thong noi bo.
- Ket noi chi dung HTTP GET; ERP khong gui, sua, xoa hoac ghi bat ky du lieu nao len he thong cong ty.
- Khong luu tai khoan, mat khau, cookie hay token cua he thong noi bo.
- Hien thi tung dong PO rieng biet; cac dong cung ma SAP van duoc giu nguyen de khop nghiep vu PO.
- Tai Ten linh kien, Vendor, SL theo PO va goi y Part Number; Part Number van cho phep nhap tay khi can.
- Ho tro chon tat ca/chon tung dong, ap dung chung SL/Tem, So Tem, Lot, Vi tri va ngay thang.
- SL theo PO chi dung tham khao; ERP bat buoc kiem tra SL/Tem, So Tem, Part Number va Vendor truoc khi ADD.
- ADD nhieu dong PO vao DANH SACH ADD DOI IN trong mot lan, giu nguyen luong TAO TEM va TAO CSV hien tai.
- PO duoc gan vao PoCode/UserData5 cua tung dong de truy vet.
- Nang cap Lot: neu de trong khi ADD, ERP tu sinh Lot dang yyyyMMddHHmmss.
- Khi ADD hang loat tu PO, mot Lot tu sinh duoc dung chung cho cac dong dang de trong trong cung dot ADD.
- Lot da sinh duoc luu ngay vao danh sach, khong bi sinh lai khi TAO TEM hoac TAO CSV.
- Neu mang/he thong PO loi, ERP canh bao nhe va luong nhap Label thu cong van hoat dong binh thuong.
- Sap xep nhap ngay PO theo luong Ngay SX - Thoi han - Ngay HH - Ngay Ve; thoi han mac dinh 2 nam va co lua chon 6 thang, 1 nam, 2 nam, 3 nam hoac tuy chinh.
- Cua so Tra cuu PO mo mac dinh toan man hinh, ve giao dien truoc roi nap goi y Part Number nen thao tac mo va tai PO muot hon.
- Ngay HH tu tinh theo Ngay SX va thoi han; o ngay hien dd/MM/yyyy, tu chuyen ngay/thang/nam khi go va chuyen sang Ngay Ve sau khi nhap du 8 chu so ddMMyyyy.
- Neu mot SAP co nhieu Part Number, ERP khong tu doan ma de trong, danh dau can chon va cung cap danh sach goi y de nguoi dung chon dung.
- Khi nhap SL/Tem, So Tem tu dong tinh bang lam tron len SL theo PO chia SL/Tem cho tung dong PO.
- PO khong ton tai/khong doc duoc duoc bao bang popup noi ngan gon, tu mat va dong ngay khi nguoi dung nhap lai, khong can bam OK.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.3.0.0 - hoan thien TAO CSV va khoi dong 14/07/2026
============================================================

- Hoan thien hai dau ra rieng khi bam TAO CSV: mot CSV ban in BarTender va cac CSV he thong.
- Chuan hoa thu tu Rank: UserData1 = Rank Mau, UserData2 = Rank Ap, UserData3 = Rank Quang.
- CSV ban in gom 30 cot; ba cot cuoi co thu tu co dinh: SAPCode, Ten LK, So TT.
- Them So TT dang STT0001, STT0002... theo tung thang; khong bi lap lai neu nguoi dung xoa file cu.
- So TT duoc ghi vao cot cuoi cua CSV ban in va gan vao duoi ten CSV ban in.
- Ten cac CSV he thong cung duoc gan cung So TT de tim kiem va doi chieu nhanh.
- CSV he thong tiep tuc giu nguyen schema 28 cot de tuong thich he thong cong ty.
- Mot lan TAO CSV chi xoa danh sach ADD sau khi CSV ban in, CSV he thong va lich su TD Gang deu thanh cong.
- Thong bao TAO CSV thanh cong doi sang popup noi, tu dong dong khi nguoi dung tiep tuc thao tac, khong can bam OK.
- Sau TAO CSV, Explorer mo CSV he thong tai thu muc Converter; khong mo nham thu muc CSV ban in.
- Nang cap Explorer: tai su dung cua so thu muc da mo, mot file thi chon dung file, nhieu file chi mo mot thu muc.
- Khong mo Explorer neu chuyen doi loi, bi huy hoac khong tao duoc CSV hop le.
- Them quyen cap nhat dac biet trong license: NONE, VERSION_LIMIT, UNTIL_DATE va LIFETIME.
- Ban update co approvalRequired chi duoc tai khi license da duoc chu so huu cap quyen phu hop.
- OWNER duoc quyen cap nhat vinh vien; CUSTOMER co the duoc gioi han theo phien ban hoac ngay.
- Sua nut khoa chi hien trong man Label, khong con noi sang cac tab Thong tin/Ho tro/Cai dat.
- Toi uu khoi dong ERP: chan Resize chong nhau, hoan tat rootLayout truoc khi hien va preload Converter tre mot nhip.
- Khong con hien frame trang, control chong len nhau hoac nhay bo cuc khi vua mo ERP.
- Them nut TUAN theo Ngay Ve va bang tra cuu tuan ISO 8601 (Thu Hai den Chu nhat), ho tro tim nhanh theo tuan/nam.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.2.1 - bo sung TAO CSV 13/07/2026
============================================================

- Them nut TAO CSV tren man hinh Label, giu nguyen luong TAO TEM XLSX hien tai.
- Them ba o Rank Mau, Rank Ap, Rank Quang tuong ung UserData1, UserData2, UserData3; de trong se tu dung gia tri NO.
- UserData4 tiep tuc dung dung quy tac hien tai: SAPCode-NgayVe(ddMMyyyy).
- UserData5 lay tu PO; neu PO de trong thi dung gia tri mac dinh 1.
- Tao CSV ban in tong hop gom 30 cot; them Ten LK va So TT sau SAPCode de BarTender doc truc tiep.
- CSV ban in sinh so dong theo So Tem cua tung dong ADD va tao ReelID lien tuc trong mot lan xuat.
- ReelID co dang STT + yyyyMMddHHmmss; STT bat dau 000, qua 999 tiep tuc 1000, 1001...
- Luu CSV ban in tai Output\Tao CSV\yyyy\MM-yyyy.
- Ten CSV ban in co dang ddMMyyyy-HHmmss - xSAP - yDong.csv.
- Dong thoi tao CSV he thong 28 cot theo dung schema Converter, tach file theo UserData4.
- CSV he thong duoc luu vao thu muc CSV da cau hinh cua Converter theo yyyy\MM-yyyy.
- Chi xoa danh sach ADD va cap nhat lich su TD Gang sau khi tat ca CSV da tao thanh cong.
- Neu xuat CSV hoac cap nhat lich su loi, ERP rollback file vua tao va giu nguyen danh sach ADD.
- Chuyen nut khoa/mo khoa du lieu thanh icon nho ben phai tieu de DANH SACH ADD DOI IN.
- Toi uu sinh dong CSV theo kieu streaming de khong nap toan bo ReelID vao RAM.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.2.1 - bo sung 09/07/2026
============================================================

- Chuyen giao dien Label sang Light Theme theo phong cach SAP Fiori / Microsoft Office, sang hon va de nhin hon.
- Sap xep lai man hinh Label: nut DU LIEU va XLSX nam trong khu vuc THONG TIN LINH KIEN.
- An hai nut icon nho khong can thiet o giua Sap Code/Vendor va Ten SP/Part/N de tang dien tich nhap lieu.
- Chuyen cum nut thao tac ben phai ve dang phang, khong bo goc loi, giu ADD / TAO TEM / UPLOAD / LUU / MO KHOA DU LIEU.
- Tang do noi bat cho ADD va TAO TEM, dong bo mau va icon FontAwesome.
- An dong User4 tren giao dien mac dinh nhung van giu du lieu xu ly noi bo.
- Can lai footer trong THONG TIN TEM, bo sung Owners Wang Huy va thong tin Pro Edition gon hon.
- Tang dien tich bang DANH SACH ADD DOI IN.
- Thu gon bang DANH SACH TD GANG THANG mac dinh chi hien thi tieu de, header va mot dong du lieu.
- Ho tro nhap dup bang TD Gang thang de mo rong/thu nho, ho tro phim ESC de thu nho.
- Sua Ctrl + F tim kiem SAP/L0 tren bang TD Gang thang, co vi tri hop thoai co dinh va thong bao khong tim thay dung vi tri.
- Dong bo giao dien bang xem nhanh/GridViewerForm voi ERP.
- Luu kich thuoc cot cua hai bang Label sau khi nguoi dung keo gian cot, tu khoi phuc sau khi tat/mo ERP.
- Them icon thu muc CSV o footer ERP: co the mo thu muc CSV vua convert ngay ca khi dang o man hinh Label.
- Converter co nut mo thu muc CSV gan nut CONVERT va nut mo CSV tren status bar cua Converter.
- Sau khi convert thanh cong, Converter chi tu mo thu muc CSV mot lan cho moi thu muc trong mot phien de tranh mo qua nhieu cua so Explorer.
- Cap nhat PDF huong dan va file huong dan text theo giao dien/luong van hanh moi.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.2.1 - 06/07/2026
============================================================

- Cai thien hieu nang khi ADD va TAO TEM, giam hien tuong ERP bi khung/giat khi tao nhieu tem.
- Toi uu luu danh sach ADD doi in: khong ghi Pending_Tem.xlsx lien tuc tung thao tac.
- Bo xu ly AutoFitColumns nang khi ghi Excel, giup tao va luu file TD Gang nhanh hon voi file thang nhieu dong.
- Toi uu backup khi ghi file, han che quet thu muc backup qua nhieu lan.
- Toi uu DataGridView khi cap nhat danh sach da tao, giam nhap nhay giao dien.
- Nang cap TCT Data Converter de chuyen tab Label/Converter muot hon.
- Converter khong restart watcher moi lan bam lai tab neu cau hinh khong thay doi.
- Them DoubleBuffered cho Converter de giao dien on dinh hon khi resize/chuyen tab.
- Luu tu dong cau hinh Converter vao ConverterSettings.json.
- Tu dong nap lai TXT Folder, CSV Save Folder va Ten ban in khi mo ERP lan sau.
- Neu duong dan da luu khong con ton tai, Converter chi canh bao nhe trong Activity Log va khong crash.
- Nang cap o Ten ban in thanh ComboBox, co the go tay hoac chon tu danh sach.
- ComboBox Ten ban in tu dong lay goi y tu lich su da convert va thu muc Data\PrintTemplates.
- Ho tro danh sach template gom file .btw, .xlsx, .csv.
- Khi chon/nhap Ten ban in, ERP tu luu lua chon cho lan sau.
- Giu nguyen logic convert TXT sang CSV hien tai.
- Cap nhat huong dan su dung va huong dan tao ban update moi chi tiet hon.
- Bo sung vi tri sua AppVersion trong Form1.cs.
- Bo sung vi tri sua AssemblyVersion va AssemblyFileVersion trong AssemblyInfo.cs.
- Bo sung huong dan tao ZIP/Version.json bang ReleaseBuilder.
- Bo sung cach lay link raw GitHub va sua downloadUrl dung cach.
- Bo sung checklist kiem tra khi ERP khong bao update.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.1.2 - 27/06/2026
============================================================

- Ban test Auto Update bang Version.json + ZIP + UpdateService.exe.
- Kiem tra luong tai update, SHA256, backup, giai nen va mo lai ERP.
- Them menu Ho tro > Kiem tra cap nhat de test update thu cong.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.1.1 - 26/06/2026
============================================================

- Them menu Ho tro > Kiem tra he thong.
- Them nut Yeu cau key trong bang Thong tin ban quyen va form Kich hoat ban quyen.
- Them o Nhap key va nut Kich hoat ngay trong bang Thong tin ban quyen.
- Tao file YeuCauKey_TCT_Label_ERP_...txt de khach gui cho chu so huu cap license.
- Them thong tin Zalo va tai khoan ngan hang cua chu so huu vao file yeu cau key.
- Them menu Ho tro > Kiem tra cap nhat de check update thu cong.
- Them bang kiem tra OK / Canh bao / Loi kem goi y xu ly.
- Them menu Ho tro > Tao goi ho tro de gom log, cai dat va thong tin may.
- Sua license luu tai ProgramData de chay Admin va chay thuong dung chung ban quyen.
- Sua quyen file license.dat de giam loi Access denied.
- Sua dieu kien canh bao trung dong: chi canh bao khi dong ADD giong toan bo thong tin tem.
- Doi title phan mem sang TcT LaBel - TD Gang phien ban ...
- Chinh bang goi y SAP nam ngay duoi chan o Sap Code / Ten LK.
- Chinh cum nut du lieu/xlsx/upload gon hon, nut khoa bang thanh icon nho.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.2.1.0 - 25/06/2026
============================================================

- Them he thong ban quyen Trial / Customer / Owner.
- Them form kich hoat ban quyen va hien thi Ma may.
- Them tool GenerateLicense.exe cho chu so huu.
- Tach Customer_Package va Owner_Tools de tranh gui nham tool cap license.
- Them menu Cai dat de chinh Output, Backup, so ngay giu backup.
- Them menu Nhat ky de xem log theo ngay.
- Them backup tu dong khi ghi MasterData va TD Gang.
- Them log thao tac quan trong.
- Them co che luu tam danh sach tem dang cho Tao Tem.
- File TD Gang tu dong tach theo thang: TD Gang thang MM-yyyy.xlsx.
- Them cot TT cho cac bang hien thi.
- Them tim kiem Ctrl + F trong GridViewerForm theo Sap Code hoac L0.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.0.0
============================================================

- Nen tang ERP tao tem TD Gang.
- Quan ly MasterData Sap Code / Ten LK / Vendor / PartNumber.
- ADD danh sach tem va Tao Tem ra file Excel.
